item.title: 一起碰碰🦞钳：AIDONE 3.0 圆满落幕
item.guid: 一起碰碰🦞钳：AIDONE-3.0-圆满落幕
item.description:
Last Saturday (March 21), APPSO, in collaboration with several AI partners, hosted the AIDONE 3.0 "OpenClaw Lobster Meet" at "Future Society 533". 上周六（3 月 21 日），APPSO 联合多位 AI 好伙伴，在「未来社·533」举办了 AIDONE 3.0「OpenClaw 龙虾会」。

This 'Lobster Meet-up' attracted thousands of participants, who, along with various Demo Show presenters and open mic guests, helped OpenClaw, this 'little lobster,' shed its shell on site. 本次「龙虾会」共「摇来了」上千名小伙伴，与各路 Demo Show 分享者、开放麦嘉宾一起在现场为 OpenClaw 这只「小龙虾」脱壳。

At the event, there were 10 OpenClaw project roadshows, 11 hardcore sharing sessions by OPC super individuals, 8 experience booths from leading brands, and 3 major companies setting up stalls on-site to offer free 'shrimp' installations. 活动上，共有 10 个 OpenClaw 项目路演，11 位 OPC 超级个体的硬核分享，8 家头部厂牌的体验展位，同时还有 3 家大厂在现场支摊免费装「虾」。

Some came to showcase projects, some to share experiences, but most came for one thing: to see firsthand how capable this 'lobster' called OpenClaw truly is. 有人要带着项目来秀，有人带着经验来分享，更多人只为一件事：亲眼看看这只叫 OpenClaw 的「龙虾」到底有多能打。

Finally, a big thank you to every participant who attended. We look forward to seeing you at the next AIDONE event! 最后很感谢到场的每一位小伙伴，期待与你们在 AIDONE 的下一次活动，不见不散！

Partners: QLab, AeroBand, Baidu AI Cloud, CANDYSIGN Sugar Factory, ChengZhi Intelligence, Volcengine, Jiyue Xingchen, Lingxin Shuke, MiniMax, Qingxian Intelligence, Tencent Cloud WorkBuddy, Zhipu (listed alphabetically by Chinese pinyin) 合作伙伴：QLab、AeroBand、百度智能云、CANDYSIGN 制糖工厂、成至智能、火山引擎、阶跃星辰、领信数科、MiniMax、清闲智能、腾讯云 WorkBuddy、智谱（按中文首字母排列）

Guiding Unit: Guangzhou Tianhe District Bureau of Science, Technology, Industry and Information Technology 指导单位：广州市天河区科技工业和信息化局

item.title: 库克：迫不及待想看看中国 AI 下一步进展
item.guid: 库克：迫不及待想看看中国-AI-下一步进展
item.description:
Image courtesy of The Wall Street Journal

According to China News Service, Apple CEO Tim Cook recently stated in an interview that the development of China's robotics industry is impressive, and he is very much looking forward to artificial intelligence (AI), eager to see the next steps in this field. 据中国新闻网报道，苹果 CEO 库克日前在接受采访时表示，中国机器人行业发展令人印象深刻，并且其对人工智能（AI）非常期待，并迫不及待想看看该领域下一步进展。

The report stated that Cook pointed out at the opening ceremony of the China Development Forum 2026 Annual Meeting that the spirit of innovation is profoundly changing China's manufacturing industry: companies that once relied on manual processes have now become one of the world's most advanced manufacturers, achieving remarkable progress in automation and intelligent manufacturing, reaching new heights in efficiency and standards. 报道称，库克在中国发展高层论坛 2026 年年会开幕式上指出，创新精神在深刻改变着中国制造业：曾经依赖人工流程的企业，如今已跃升为全球最先进的制造商之一，在自动化和智能制造领域取得令人瞩目的进步，效率和水平达到全新高度。

According to CCTV Finance, Cook also stated in an interview with China Central Television that 'AI is an amplification of human capabilities, not a replacement for humans.' 另据央视财经报道，库克在接受中台采访时还表示，「人工智能是对人能力的放大，而不是对人的取代。」

He believes that people should let go of their fears and start using it in their daily lives, 'to think about how it can help you, how it can make you more efficient, and how it can help you share some of your workload.' 其认为大家应该放下恐惧，先在日常生活中开始使用它，「去思考它能如何帮到你、如何让你更高效、如何帮你分担一部分手头的工作。」

item.title: 全球首个脑机接口创新产品获得医保编码
item.guid: 全球首个脑机接口创新产品获得医保编码
item.description:
According to news from the 'National Healthcare Security Administration' yesterday, on March 13, the world's first invasive brain-computer interface medical device was officially approved for market launch. 据「国家医保局」昨日消息，3 月 13 日，全球首款侵入式脑机接口医疗器械正式获批上市。

And on March 15, the National Healthcare Security Administration proactively engaged and provided advance services, completing the medical insurance coding for the product, successfully opening up the critical link for innovative products from market approval to clinical application. 而在 3 月 15 日国家医保局已主动对接、靠前服务，为该产品完成医保编码赋码，成功打通创新产品从获批上市到临床应用的关键环节。

The report pointed out that the above marks the brain-computer interface industry's official transition from 'planning blueprint' to 'fast track implementation'. 报道指出，上述标志着脑机接口产业从「规划蓝图」正式驶入「落地快车道」。

It is understood that the 'Implantable Brain-Computer Interface Hand Motor Function Compensation System' approved this time is primarily aimed at high-level paraplegic patients due to spinal cord injury. The report noted that currently, the cumulative number of spinal cord injury patients in China exceeds 3.7 million, and is increasing at a rate of approximately 90,000 people per year. 据悉，本次获批的「植入式脑机接口手部运动功能代偿系统」，主要面向因脊髓损伤导致的高位截瘫患者。报道指出，目前我国脊髓损伤患者已累计超过 370 万人，且以每年约 9 万人的速度递增。

It is understood that by implanting a coin-sized minimally invasive device inside the patient's skull, the system can real-time collect and decode brain electrical signals, allowing patients to control external pneumatic gloves with their 'thoughts' and independently complete daily actions such as gripping, picking up objects, and drinking water; after only one month post-surgery, patients can operate it independently at home. 据了解，通过在患者颅内植入一枚硬币大小的微创装置，系统可实时采集并解码脑电信号，让患者能够凭「意念」控制外部的气动手套，自主完成抓握、取物、喝水等日常动作；术后仅需一个月，患者即可居家自主操作。

item.title: OpenAI 计划大规模招聘
item.guid: OpenAI-计划大规模招聘
item.description:
Recently, according to reports from the Financial Times and Reuters, OpenAI plans to expand its total workforce to 8,000 employees by the end of 2026. 近期，据《金融时报》及路透社报道，OpenAI 计划在 2026 年底前将员工总数扩充至 8000 人。

It is understood that OpenAI currently has approximately 4,500 employees, and if this large-scale recruitment is completed, its team size will nearly double. 据了解，OpenAI 现有约 4500 名员工，若完成本次大规模招聘，其团队规模近乎翻倍。

Sources revealed that the newly added headcount will primarily focus on core business departments such as product development, engineering technology, frontier research, and sales. 知情人士透露，此次新增的人员编制将主要集中于产品开发、工程技术、前沿研究以及销售等核心业务部门。

At the same time, the company is significantly increasing its recruitment efforts for 'technical ambassador' experts. The establishment of these positions aims to directly connect with enterprise clients, assisting them in more efficiently integrating and deploying their AI tools. 同时，该公司正显著加大对「技术大使」类专家的招聘力度。该系列岗位的设立旨在直接对接企业端客户，协助企业更高效地集成与部署其人工智能工具。

According to news from "Cailian Press" and other sources, the competitive environment faced by OpenAI is becoming increasingly severe. Data shows that among enterprise customers purchasing AI products for the first time, the proportion choosing Anthropic has reached three times that of OpenAI. 另据「财联社」等消息，OpenAI 所面临的竞争环境也愈发严峻。数据显示，在首次采购 AI 产品的企业客户中，选择 Anthropic 的比例已达到 OpenAI 的三倍。

Facing pressure from external competitors, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman issued a "code red" internally in early December last year, halting several non-core projects and reallocating team resources to accelerate mainline R&D, in response to the market challenges brought by Google Gemini 3. 面对外部竞品的施压，OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 曾于去年 12 月初在内部下达「红色警报（code red）」，叫停多项非核心项目，重新调配团队资源以加速主线研发，以此回应谷歌 Gemini 3 带来的市场挑战。

item.title: 英伟达：DLSS 5 不读取 3D 引擎数据
item.guid: 英伟达：DLSS-5-不读取-3D-引擎数据
item.description:
During a recent Q&A session at GTC 2026, someone asked Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang about external criticism that DLSS 5 is merely frame-level post-processing, just a filter. Huang then retorted, "You've got it completely wrong. This isn't frame-level post-processing; it's generative control at the geometric level." 近期 GTC 2026 的现场 Q&A 上，有人问英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋，外界批评 DLSS 5 只是帧级后处理，只是一个滤镜。随后黄仁勋回击称「你们完全搞错了。这不是帧级后处理，这是几何层面的生成控制。」

Nvidia's official statement also corroborated this, saying: "DLSS 5 inputs the game's color and motion vectors into the model, anchoring the output in the source 3D content." 同时英伟达的官方声明也配合着说：「DLSS 5 将游戏的颜色和运动矢量输入模型，将输出锚定在源 3D 内容中。」

However, recently, game technology blogger Daniel Owen contacted Nvidia GeForce expert Jacob Freeman and asked him, "Does DLSS 5 actually generate output frames using only a single 2D image plus motion vectors as input?" Nvidia's response was "Yes." 但日前游戏技术博主 Daniel Owen 联系了英伟达 GeForce 专家 Jacob Freeman，并向后者提问「DLSS 5 是否实际上只以单帧 2D 图像加运动矢量作为输入来生成输出帧？」而英伟达方面表示「是的」。

It is understood that the workflow of DLSS 5 is actually: after the game engine renders a frame, this frame, along with motion vectors, is passed to the AI model, which then generates a layer of "more realistic" lighting and material effects on top of it, outputting it to the player. 据悉，DLSS 5 的工作流程实际上是： 游戏引擎渲染出一帧画面后，这帧画面连同运动矢量一起传给 AI 模型，然后模型在上面生成一层「更真实」的光线和材质效果，输出给玩家。

Simply put, DLSS 5 never reads the geometric data of game assets, nor does it read data from the depth buffer; it does not read any physics-based rendering (PBR) data from the game engine. 简单来讲，DLSS 5 从来没有读取游戏素材的几何数据，甚至没有读取深度缓冲中的数据，其不会读取来自游戏引擎的任何基于物理的渲染 (PBR) 方面的数据。

According to the answer Owen received from an Nvidia evangelist, the DLSS 5 model "infers" material properties from the final 2D rendered frame. 根据 Owen 从英伟达布道师那里获得的答案，DLSS 5 模型从最终的 2D 渲染帧里「推断（infer）」材质属性。

🔗 Related reading: Jensen Huang Fooled Everyone, DLSS 5 Is Truly a Pure AI Filter 🔗 相关阅读： 黄仁勋骗了所有人，DLSS 5 真是个纯 AI 滤镜

item.title: 中国 AI 大模型调用量领跑全球
item.guid: 中国-AI-大模型调用量领跑全球
item.description:
According to CCTV Finance, the latest data released by OpenRouter, the world's largest AI model API aggregation platform, shows: 据央视财经报道，全球最大 AI 模型 API 聚合平台 OpenRouter 最新发布的数据显示：

As of March 15, the weekly call volume of China's large AI models reached 4.69 trillion Tokens, surpassing the United States for the second consecutive week.

The report states that the top three positions in global call volume were all taken by Chinese models. 报道称，全球调用量排名前三的位置，更是被中国模型包揽。

JPMorgan Chase predicts that China's AI inference Token consumption will grow from approximately 10 quadrillion in 2025 to approximately 3,900 quadrillion in 2030, an increase of about 370 times in five years. 据摩根大通预测，中国的 AI 推理 Token 消耗量将从 2025 年的约 10 千万亿增长至 2030 年的约 3900 千万亿，五年间增长约 370 倍。

item.title: 马斯克推出「TERAFAB」：计划每年生产千亿芯片
item.guid: 马斯克推出「TERAFAB」：计划每年生产千亿芯片
item.description:
Yesterday, Elon Musk's Tesla, xAI, and SpaceX jointly announced plans to invest approximately $20 billion to build a vertically integrated semiconductor factory called "TERAFAB." 昨日，马斯克旗下特斯拉、xAI 与 SpaceX 联合宣布，计划投资约 200 亿美元建设垂直整合型半导体工厂「TERAFAB」。

It is reported that the TERAFAB project aims to produce over 1 terawatt of AI computing power annually. The facility will integrate the entire semiconductor manufacturing process, including chip design, lithography, wafer fabrication, memory production, advanced packaging, and testing. 据悉， TERAFAB 项目旨在每年生产超过 1 太瓦的 AI 算力。 该设施将整合芯片设计、光刻、晶圆制造、存储器生产、先进封装及测试等半导体制造全流程。

In its initial phase, a prototype factory will be built within Tesla's Gigafactory Texas in Austin, primarily for rapid testing and iteration of edge inference chips and specialized chips optimized for space environments. 项目初期将在得克萨斯州奥斯汀的特斯拉超级工厂（Giga Texas）内建设原型工厂，主要用于快速测试并迭代端侧推理芯片及针对太空环境优化的特殊芯片。

Regarding core parameters and capacity planning, TERAFAB aims to use a 2-nanometer process technology. Initial capacity is set at 100,000 wafers per month, with a final full-production target of 1 million wafers per month. Musk stated that the factory is expected to produce 100 billion to 200 billion customized AI and memory chips annually. 在核心参数与产能规划上，TERAFAB 目标采用 2 纳米制程工艺。初期产能设定为每月 10 万片晶圆，最终满产目标为每月 100 万片晶圆。马斯克表示， 该工厂每年预计将产出 1000 亿至 2000 亿颗定制化 AI 及存储芯片。

Musk also revealed yesterday that approximately 80% of TERAFAB's capacity will be dedicated to space applications, with the remaining 20% for terrestrial applications. 马斯克昨日还发文透露， TERAFAB 其中约 80% 的产能将用于太空领域，剩余约 20% 则面向地面应用。

item.title: 劳斯莱斯放弃全面电动化
item.guid: 劳斯莱斯放弃全面电动化
item.description:
According to TESLARATI, Rolls-Royce recently officially announced that it is abandoning its strategic goal of achieving full electrification by 2030. 据 TESLARATI 报道，劳斯莱斯日前正式宣布放弃到 2030 年实现全面电动化的战略目标。

The report states that Rolls-Royce's new CEO, Chris Brownridge, said that the company will no longer adhere to a strict all-electric timetable, and future production plans will be determined directly "according to customer order demand." This means Rolls-Royce will continue to retain and offer its iconic V12 internal combustion engine models. 报道称，劳斯莱斯新任 CEO Chris Brownridge 表示， 公司将不再执行严格的全面纯电时间表，未来的生产计划将直接「根据客户订单需求」来决定。 而这意味着劳斯莱斯将继续保留并提供其标志性的 V12 燃油发动机车型。

The report stated that this decision marks Rolls-Royce's withdrawal from the commitment made by the previous management in 2022 to "stop producing internal combustion engines by the end of this century." 报道称，这一决策标志着劳斯莱斯撤回了前任管理层在 2022 年定下的「到本世纪末停止生产内燃机」的承诺。

However, despite the strategic shift, Rolls-Royce has not completely halted its electric vehicle business. Its first pure electric model, "Spectre," will continue to be produced, and there are plans to launch a pure electric version of the Cullinan in the future. 但尽管战略生变， 劳斯莱斯并未完全叫停电动车业务，其首款纯电车型「闪灵」仍将继续生产，并计划在未来推出纯电版库里南。

item.title: 理想产品负责人：新车的全主动悬架不是某一供应商提供
item.guid: 理想产品负责人：新车的全主动悬架不是某一供应商提供
item.description:
Recently, Tang Jing, head of Ideal Auto's product line, posted a response to the supplier issue of the new L9 Livis's 800V fully active suspension. 近日，理想汽车产品线负责人汤靖发文回应了新车 L9 Livis 的 800V 全主动悬架供应商问题。

Tang Jing stated that the Ideal L9 Livis's 800V fully active suspension is a complete system, "not provided by a single supplier." 汤靖表示，理想 L9 Livis 的 800V 全主动悬架是一套完整系统，「不是某一个供应商提供的。」

According to him, the new car's 800V fully active suspension includes air springs, dual-valve CDC active shock absorbers, four independent hydraulic pumps, high-pressure pipelines, and the control and tuning of the entire system. 据其透露，新车的 800V 全主动悬架包含空气弹簧、双阀 CDC 主动减震器、四个独立液压泵、高压管路，以及对整个系统的控制和调校。

As for this fully active suspension, since no suitable Tier 1 (i.e., a car manufacturer's primary supplier) could be found, Ideal chose to act as the "general contractor" themselves. 而本次的全主动悬架因寻找不到合适的 Tier 1（即车厂一级供应商），所以理想选择自己做「总包」。

At the same time, Tang Jing also revealed his view on "the biggest role of active suspension": "controlling the first order, which is displacement, which is what we commonly refer to as roll and pitch." 同时汤靖还公布了自己对「主动悬架最大的作用」的观点：「控制一阶，也就是位移， 也就是我们平常经常说的侧倾，俯仰。」

item.title: 手持智能相机市场迎来大爆发
item.guid: 手持智能相机市场迎来大爆发
item.description:
Recently, the institution IDC released its latest "Global Quarterly Handheld Smart Camera Market Tracking Report, Q4 2025," which shows: 日前，机构 IDC 发布最新《全球季度手持智能相机市场跟踪报告，2025 年第四季度》，报告显示：

In 2025, global handheld smart camera market shipments reached 16.65 million units, a sharp increase of 83% year-on-year. Sales revenue exceeded 46.1 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 86%.

In response, IDC predicts that by 2030, the global handheld smart camera market size is expected to exceed 40 million units, with a five-year compound annual growth rate of nearly 20%. 对此，IDC 预计，至 2030 年，全球手持智能相机市场规模有望超过 4000 万台，五年复合增长率接近 20%。

It is worth mentioning that IDC's definition of handheld smart cameras refers to consumer-grade portable imaging devices that have computing processing capabilities, are equipped with electronic or optical anti-shake capabilities, have a resolution of 2K or higher, and can be used handheld, including action cameras, panoramic cameras, and gimbal cameras. 值得一提的是，IDC 对手持智能相机的定义是指具备计算处理能力，搭载电子或光学等防抖能力，分辨率 2K 及以上且可手持使用的消费级便携影像设备，包括运动相机，全景相机和云台相机。

Specifically, looking at the major competitive manufacturers in the global handheld smart camera market in 2025, DJI ranked first with a 62% market share in shipments; Insta360 maintained its lead in the global panoramic camera and "thumb camera" (i.e., IDC's definition of detachable action cameras) markets. 具体来看，从 2025 年度全球手持智能相机市场主要竞争厂商来看，大疆以 62% 出货量市场份额排名第一；影石在全球全景相机和「拇指相机」（即 IDC 定义的可拆卸运动相机）市场保持领先。

Meanwhile, GoPro has been significantly impacted in both the panoramic camera and action camera segments under the pressure from DJI and Insta360, with a clear contraction in shipments. 而 GoPro 在大疆和影石的夹击下无论全景相机和运动相机领域都受到明显冲击，出货量收缩明显。

item.title: 💡 陶哲轩：AI 已将科学想法生成的成本降至接近零
item.guid: 💡-陶哲轩：AI-已将科学想法生成的成本降至接近零
item.description:
According to foreign media THE DECODER, renowned mathematician Terence Tao publicly stated that AI technology has reduced the cost of generating scientific ideas to near zero, making theoretical verification and evaluation a new bottleneck in current mathematical research. 据外媒 THE DECODER 报道，知名数学家陶哲轩公开表示，AI 技术已将科学想法生成的成本降至接近零，并使得理论验证与评估成为当前数学研究的新瓶颈。

The report pointed out that Terence Tao compared the impact of AI on the mathematical community to the impact of automobiles on urban development. 报道指出，陶哲轩将 AI 对数学界的影响比作汽车对城市发展的冲击。

He believes that existing infrastructure such as academic journals and conferences was built for humans, and while the human process of finding proofs is slower, it can generate valuable by-products such as accumulating expertise and exploring new directions. 其认为，现有的学术期刊与会议等基础设施是为人类建立的，人类寻找证明的过程虽然较慢，但能产生积累专业知识、探索新方向等有价值的副产品。

In contrast, while AI-assisted proofs can efficiently derive results from hypotheses, they lack the proof paths and logical narratives required by traditional journals. 相比之下，AI 辅助证明虽能高效地从假设推导至结果，却缺失了传统期刊所需的证明路径与逻辑叙事。

Terence Tao emphasized that the cost of generating scientific hypotheses under AI-driven approaches has approached zero, similar to the trajectory of the internet significantly reducing communication costs. 陶哲轩在强调， AI 驱动下生成科学假设的成本已趋近于零，这与互联网大幅降低通信成本的轨迹相似。

He explicitly stated that this has led to a substantial shift in the bottleneck of scientific research: because thousands of theories can now be instantly generated for a single scientific problem, the academic community's current core challenge has shifted from "proposing theories" to "verifying and evaluating massive theories." 他明确表示，这导致科学研究的瓶颈发生实质性转移：由于现在面对单一科学问题即可瞬间生成数以千计的理论，学术界当前的核心挑战已从「提出理论」转向「验证与评估海量理论」。

Addressing the structural contradictions brought about by this technological evolution, Terence Tao believes that the academic community should not forcibly integrate AI into existing academic evaluation systems, but rather turn to building new machine-oriented mathematical infrastructure. 针对这一技术演进带来的结构性矛盾，陶哲轩认为学术界不应该将 AI 强行塞入现有的学术评价体系，而是转向构建面向机器的全新数学基础设施。

item.title: 微信推出官方龙虾插件
item.guid: 微信推出官方龙虾插件
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat officially launched its official plugin "WeChat ClawBot". 昨天，微信正式推出官方插件「微信 ClawBot」。

"WeChat ClawBot" supports integration with OpenClaw ("Lobster") AI assistant. Users can complete the connection by scanning a QR code or copying a command, and then interact efficiently with their "Lobster" directly within the WeChat chat interface. 「微信 ClawBot」支持接入 OpenClaw（「龙虾」）AI 助手，用户扫码或复制指令即可完成连接，此后便能直接在微信聊天界面与自己的「龙虾」高效互动。

According to the official instructions, the integration method is divided into two steps: First, open WeChat on your phone, click "Me - Settings - Plugins" in order, and enable relevant functions according to the authorization prompt that pops up on the page; Second, enter the OpenClaw business card page, scan the QR code as instructed, add WeChat ClawBot as a plugin, and complete account binding. 根据官方说明，接入方式分为两步：第一步，打开手机微信，依次点击「我—设置—插件」，根据页面弹出的授权提示开启相关功能；第二步，进入 OpenClaw 名片页面，按照指引扫描二维码，将微信 ClawBot 添加为插件并完成账号绑定。

After the operation is complete, users can directly send commands to "Lobster" and receive replies via WeChat, suitable for daily scenarios such as learning, work problem-solving, and content creation. Currently, the plugin is still being rolled out gradually and requires an update to the latest version for use. 操作完成后，用户即可通过微信直接向「龙虾」发送指令、接收回复，适用于学习、工作问题解答及内容创作等日常场景。目前该插件仍在逐步放量中，需更新至最新版本方可使用。

It is worth noting that this integration between WeChat and OpenClaw is not an isolated case. Currently, multiple products under Tencent have completed the integration: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse; WorkBuddy desktop client; local client QClaw. 值得关注的是，此次微信与 OpenClaw 的打通并非孤例，目前腾讯旗下多个产品均已完成接入：腾讯云 Lighthouse；WorkBuddy 桌面端；本地客户端 QClaw。

On the same day, Juyue Xingchen, Zhipu, MiniMax, and Kimi also announced that StepClaw (Juyue Xingchen), AutoClaw Aolong (Zhipu), MaxClaw (MiniMax), and Kimi Claw are compatible with WeChat. 就在同一天，阶跃星辰、智谱、MiniMax 和 Kimi 也都宣布，StepClaw（阶跃星辰）、AutoClaw 澳龙（智谱）、MaxClaw（MiniMax）和 Kimi Claw 适配微信。

Zhang Jun, Tencent's PR Director, also posted that what WeChat strived for back then was to become a tool connecting people, devices, and services; and this concept is still valid. "This connection can make it easier for everyone to better manage their own 'lobsters'." 腾讯公关总监张军还发文表示，微信当年所努力的，就是成为一个连接人、连接设备、连接服务的工具；而这个理念依然有效。「这个连接，可以方便每个人更好地管理自己的龙虾。」

item.title: 消息称新款 HomePod 仍需等待
item.guid: 消息称新款-HomePod-仍需等待
item.description:
Last night, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman published the latest "PowerOn" article, mentioning the latest progress on the new HomePod and Apple TV. 昨晚，彭博社记者 Mark Gumran 发布最新一篇《PowerOn》，其中提及了新款 HomePod 以及 Apple TV 的最新进度。

Gurman stated that although the inventory of HomePod mini and Apple TV in several Apple Stores has decreased again, this does not mean that new products are coming soon. Gurman 表示，虽然目前多家 Apple Store 的 HomePod mini、Apple TV 的库存再次出现减少情况，但这并不意味着新品将至。

He still stated that although the new HomePod mini and Apple TV are ready, the new products have been delayed due to the new version of Siri and other AI features not being ready yet. 其依然表示，新款 HomePod mini、Apple TV 虽然已经准备好，而新品因为新版 Siri 以及其他 AI 功能尚未准备好，导致一直推迟发布。

According to previous news from Gurman, Apple also plans to launch a HomePod product with a screen after the new Siri and AI function upgrades are ready. The product's screen supports detachment and features a brand-new system interface design. 另据 Gurman 此前消息，苹果还计划在准备好新 Siri 和 AI 功能升级后，推出一款带屏的 HomePod 产品。该产品屏幕支持拆卸，并且拥有全新的系统界面设计。

item.title: 雷军：小米「龙虾」电脑版正在开发
item.guid: 雷军：小米「龙虾」电脑版正在开发
item.description:
According to China News Service, Lei Jun, founder of Xiaomi Group, responded to whether he raises "lobsters," stating, "Xiaomi just released MiClaw, which is also the first mobile 'lobster' in China. Everyone is welcome to review it." 据中国新闻网报道，小米集团创始人雷军回应了是否养「龙虾」，其表示「小米刚发布 MiClaw，也是国内首款手机『龙虾』，欢迎大家测评。」

Meanwhile, according to the reported video, a reporter asked, "You mentioned the PC version of 'Little Lobster' last time, is there a plan for it?" Lei Jun replied, "Yes, there is a plan, and it's currently under development." 同时据报道的视频显示，记者提问「您上次说那个电脑版「小龙虾」已经有计划了吗？」雷军回答表示「有计划，正在开发之中。」

It is reported that Xiaomi officially launched its own "Lobster" intelligent agent, Xiaomi MiClaw, recently, which supports controlling phones and Mijia devices with a single sentence. 小米官方于近期推出了自家的「龙虾」智能体 Xiaomi MiClaw，并且支持一句话操控手机、米家设备。

According to the official introduction, Xiaomi MiClaw enables phones to become AI tools. After understanding user intent and receiving authorization, it can invoke first-party applications and ecosystem capabilities, and also independently select system-level tools to complete relevant commands. 官方介绍，Xiaomi miclaw 能让手机成为 AI 的工具，在理解用户的意图和给予授权后，调用一方应用、生态能力，也能自主选择系统级工具，完成相关命令。

After the spring launch event last week, Lei Jun stated that Xiaomi's goal is to join the ranks of top players domestically and globally. He frankly said, "Our model has just been released and may require continuous iteration. At the same time, we have also developed a mobile 'lobster' and will soon develop a PC 'lobster'." 而在上周春季发布会结束后，雷军称小米的目标是跻身国内乃至全球的头部行列。他坦言：「我们的模型刚刚发布，可能还需要不断的迭代，同时我们又做了手机『龙虾』，很快会做电脑『龙虾』。」

item.title: 百度发布首个国产企业级满血版 OpenClaw「DuMate」
item.guid: 百度发布首个国产企业级满血版-OpenClaw「DuMate」
item.description:
On March 22, Baidu DuMate officially launched, fully open to users. This is the first domestic enterprise-grade "lobster" product, supporting local deployment, allowing enterprise users to use it securely and compliantly. 3 月 22 日，百度 DuMate 正式上线，面向用户全量开放。这是国内首个国产企业级龙虾产品，支持本地部署，企业级用户也能安全合规使用。

Addressing the current security risk pain points of "lobsters," DuMate provides a comprehensive solution, achieving multiple layers of protection. 针对目前龙虾的安全风险痛点，DuMate 提供了完善的解决方案，实现多重防护。

On one hand, DuMate achieves isolation from the local device environment through a pre-installed security sandbox, ensuring code, tasks, and files are executed in a closed loop, without affecting the local environment, spreading risks, or leaking data. 一方面，DuMate 通过预装安全沙箱，实现与本机设备环境隔离，代码、任务、文件闭环执行，不影响本地环境、不扩散风险、不泄露数据。

On the other hand, for high-risk operations such as file deletion, system modification, and data outbound transfer, DuMate will only execute them after explicit user authorization. At the same time, DuMate also possesses enterprise-level capabilities such as folder-level permission control and full auditability of operations. 另一方面，针对文件删除、系统修改、数据外发等高风险操作，DuMate 会强制用户明确授权后才执行。同时，DuMate 还具备文件夹级权限管控、操作全程可审计等企业级场景能力。

Functionally, DuMate natively supports mainstream office software such as Word, Excel, and PPT. The built-in Baidu Search Skill also gives DuMate stronger comprehension abilities and better task completion rates. In addition, DuMate also supports users to flexibly expand high-quality Skills as needed. 在功能上，DuMate 原生支持 Word、Excel、PPT 等主流办公软件。内置百度搜索 Skill，也让 DuMate 拥有更强的理解能力和更好的任务完成率。另外，DuMate 也支持用户按需灵活扩展优质 Skills。

DuMate further improved Baidu's OpenClaw ecosystem layout. Currently, the Baidu Lobster family bucket covers products such as Cloud Lobster, Mobile Lobster, Security Lobster, Desktop Lobster, and the world's first home-use crayfish, which can meet the lobster usage needs in different scenarios. DuMate 进一步完善了百度 OpenClaw 生态布局。目前百度龙虾全家桶，涵盖云端虾、手机虾、安全虾、桌面虾及全球首款家用小龙虾等产品，可以满足不同场景下的龙虾使用需求。

Now, you can go to the official website dumate.baidu.com to claim your trusted lobster. 现在，即可到 dumate.baidu.com 官网领取可信赖的龙虾。

item.title: 2500 亿元支持，财政部将加大直达消费者的普惠政策力度
item.guid: 2500-亿元支持，财政部将加大直达消费者的普惠政策力度
item.description:
According to CCTV News, at the China Development High-Level Forum 2026 annual meeting held yesterday (March 22), Minister of Finance Lan Fo'an stated that in response to the prominent contradiction of strong supply and weak demand in current economic operations, policy tools such as deficits, special bonds, and loan interest subsidies will be comprehensively utilized to build a strong domestic market. 据央视新闻消息，在昨日（3 月 22 日）举行的中国发展高层论坛 2026 年年会上，财政部部长蓝佛安表示，针对当前经济运行中供强需弱的突出矛盾，将综合运用赤字、专项债、贷款贴息等政策工具，建设强大国内市场。

Lan Fo'an stated that consumption will be boosted with greater efforts, and the intensity of inclusive policies directly benefiting consumers will be increased: 蓝佛安表示，将以更大力度提振消费，加大直达消费者的普惠政策力度：

    This year, 250 billion yuan in ultra-long-term special national bonds will be arranged to support trade-ins of consumer goods, and 100 billion yuan in special funds for fiscal and financial synergy to boost domestic demand will be established, providing more "real money" to promote consumption;

    At the same time, long-term consumption capacity will be enhanced, support for employment will be strengthened, the social security system will be improved, the regulatory role of taxation and transfer payments will be reinforced, and residents' incomes will be increased through multiple channels.

Lan Fo'an stated that fiscal and tax support policies will be improved to help private enterprises share risks, reduce financing costs, and mobilize the enthusiasm of private investment. 蓝佛安表示，将完善财税支持政策，帮助民营企业分担风险、降低融资成本，调动民间投资积极性。

This year, funds will be specifically allocated to provide credit enhancement for private enterprise bond issuance; a special guarantee plan for private investment will be established, and a loan interest subsidy policy for small, medium, and micro enterprises will be implemented to guide more financial resources towards business entities and the real economy. 今年将专门安排资金，为民营企业发债提供增信；设立民间投资专项担保计划，实施中小微企业贷款贴息政策，引导金融资源更多流向经营主体和实体经济。

item.title: ChatGPT 即将推出广告
item.guid: ChatGPT-即将推出广告
item.description:
According to Reuters, OpenAI announced that it will start displaying ads to all ChatGPT free and Go plan users in the United States in the coming weeks. 据路透社报道，OpenAI 宣布将在未来几周内向美国所有 ChatGPT 免费版及 Go 版用户投放广告。

According to an email statement from an OpenAI spokesperson and disclosures by "The Information," this advertising initiative will first launch in the U.S. market. OpenAI has now integrated the ad tech company Criteo into its advertising pilot program, with Criteo responsible for providing ad buying interfaces and optimizing target audience targeting. 据 OpenAI 发言人的邮件声明及《The Information》的披露，此项广告计划将率先在美国市场启动。OpenAI 现已将广告技术公司 Criteo 整合至其广告试点项目中，由后者负责提供广告购买接口并优化目标受众定向。

Sources revealed that Criteo is currently pitching to potential advertisers, asking them to commit to an advertising budget of $50,000 to $100,000. 知情人士透露，Criteo 目前正向潜在广告商进行推销，要求其承诺投入 5 万至 10 万美元的广告预算。

Meanwhile, OpenAI suggests to advertisers that providing more diverse copy and visual materials will help increase ad display frequency and ultimate conversion performance. 同时，OpenAI 方面向广告商建议，提供更多样化的文案与视觉素材将有助于提升广告的展示频率及最终转化表现。

item.title: 山姆回应深圳门店冷鲜肉争议
item.guid: 山姆回应深圳门店冷鲜肉争议
item.description:
According to multiple reports, a user at Shenzhen Sam's Club Qianhai store posted that the black pork lean meat they purchased had an actual slaughter date of November 9, 2025, and stated that Sam's Club allegedly sold thawed frozen pork as chilled fresh meat, and that relevant traceability information mysteriously disappeared after their inquiry. 据多方报道，深圳山姆前海店有用户发文称，其购买的黑猪瘦肉实际屠宰日期为 2025 年 11 月 9 日，并表示山姆疑似将冷冻解冻猪肉当作冷鲜肉销售，且相关溯源信息在其质疑后莫名消失。

Subsequently, Sam's Club Blackboard released a statement clarifying the situation and responding to the aforementioned incident. 随后山姆黑板报发布情况说明，对上述事件进行了回应。

Sam's Club stated that upon noticing recent online discussions regarding Sam's Club black pork products, it immediately conducted a comprehensive verification: 山姆表示，在留意到近期网络上关于山姆黑猪肉商品的相关讨论，并第一时间进行了全面核查：

All relevant black pork products sold at the stores are fresh and compliant chilled meat, with each batch possessing complete and valid quarantine certificates. There are no situations such as "thawed fresh" or "slaughtered months ago" as reported online. The aforementioned relevant documents and certificates can be viewed on-site at each store.

Regarding the questions about the traceability code date information, Sam's Club stated that it was mainly due to errors in the system information synchronization and verification process: 针对溯源码日期信息疑问，山姆表示主要是系统信息同步与校验环节出现失误所致：

We have currently initiated optimization work for system integration with our partners. During this process, the traceability QR codes for some products may be temporarily unavailable for inquiry. We ask for your understanding.

item.title: 网剧《逐玉》片源遭泄露，官方发文抵制盗版
item.guid: 网剧《逐玉》片源遭泄露，官方发文抵制盗版
item.description:
Recently, when the costume web drama "Zhu Yu" was updated to episode 30, the source material for all 40 episodes was leaked, and related resources were also put up for sale on second-hand platforms, priced from 1 yuan to 10 yuan. 日前，古装网剧《逐玉》更新至第 30 集时，全集 40 集的片源却遭泄露，同时相关资源也在二手平台上架开卖，标价 1 元到 10 元不等。

Subsequently, the official Weibo of "Zhu Yu" issued a statement yesterday, stating that "while strongly condemning and resolutely resisting piracy, we will thoroughly investigate the source of piracy and reserve the right to pursue criminal liability and compensation for losses." 随后《逐玉》官方微博于昨日发布声明，并表示「严厉谴责并坚决抵制盗版的同时，将严查盗版来源，保留追究其刑事责任及赔偿损失的权利。」

The official side calls on the vast number of netizens and viewers to watch "Zhu Yu" through legal broadcasting platforms, not to purchase, watch, or spread any pirated content, and not to click on links from unknown sources. 官方呼吁广大网友、观众通过合法播出平台观看《逐玉》，不购买、不观看、不传播任何盗版内容，不点击来源不明的链接。

According to official sources, since its premiere on March 6, 2026, on Tencent Video and iQiyi across the entire network, global simultaneous broadcast on Netflix, and broadcast on Dragon TV on March 8, "Zhu Yu" has received widespread support and love from audiences and netizens, with its viewership, ratings, and reputation steadily rising. 据官方介绍，《逐玉》自 2026 年 3 月 6 日于腾讯视频、爱奇艺全网首播、Netflix 全球同步播出、3 月 8 日于东方卫视播出后，受到了广大观众、网友的支持与喜爱，播放量、收视率及口碑一路走高。

item.title: 甜茶或拍摄 AI 题材新片
item.guid: 甜茶或拍摄-AI-题材新片
item.description:
According to a report by "Deadline," Warner Bros. Pictures has officially reached an agreement to acquire the film adaptation rights to Richard Powers' bestselling AI-themed novel "Playground." 据《Deadline》报道，华纳兄弟影业正式达成协议，收购理查德·鲍尔斯聚焦 AI 题材的畅销小说《游乐场》（Playground）的电影改编权。

According to foreign media reports, the project will be jointly produced by Plan B Entertainment, actor Timothée Chalamet (Sweet Tea), and Brian Swardstrom. The agreement stipulates that once the film enters the substantive development phase, Chalamet will have the first option to star as the core protagonist. 据外媒报道，该项目将由 Plan B 娱乐公司、演员提莫西·查拉梅（甜茶）及 Brian Swardstrom 共同担任制片。协议约定，影片进入实质性开发阶段后，甜茶拥有出演核心主角的优先选择权。

The original novel "Playground" was shortlisted for the Booker Prize. Its storyline spans from the University of Illinois period to the Silicon Valley tech boom, eventually extending to Makatea Island in Polynesia. 原著小说《游乐场》曾入围布克奖（Booker Prize），剧情时间线横跨伊利诺伊大学时期与硅谷科技繁荣期，最终延伸至波利尼西亚的马卡泰阿岛。

The core content of the book focuses on the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence technology, using this as an entry point to explore the impact of technological evolution on human individuals and social relationships. 该书核心内容聚焦于人工智能技术的快速推进，并以此为切入点探讨技术演进对人类个体及社会关系产生的影响。

早报
